lines.speaker: Sir Prysin
lines.text: Hello. I've heard you stopped the demon, well done.

lines.speaker: Sir Prysin
lines.text: A good job well done then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, although I'm afraid I've lost Silverlight.

lines.speaker: Sir Prysin
lines.text: Yes, news of your carelessness is almost as widespread as knowledge of your victory. Fortunately for you, Silverlight has come back into my possession.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there any chance of me borrowing it again?

lines.speaker: Sir Prysin
lines.text: I'm not going to give it away that easily again, it's far too important to be treated so disrespectfully. Especially now its powers have increased after your fight with Agrith-Naar!

lines.speaker: Sir Prysin
lines.text: If you wish to make use of Silverlight again, it will cost you 1000 gold pieces. Maybe that will encourage you to look after it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No way, it's not worth that much.

lines.speaker: Sir Prysin
lines.text: May you make good use of it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I don't have that much money.

lines.speaker: Sir Prysin
lines.text: You don't even have enough free space to carry it. Stop wasing my time!

lines.speaker: Sir Prysin
lines.text: You've come to the right place, well done!
